Tell me the restaurant name, rating, address, the price per person, and the operating hours.

The first step is to gather a list of restaurants in Paris. Once that is completed, I will proceed to filter for Chinese cuisine, check their operating hours, get the price per person, gather ratings and reviews, and finally retrieve their addresses. This process will ensure I meet all criteria set by the user.

<function_call>[get_all_restaurants_in_city(city="Paris")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
